recent_conversation.speaker: Player
recent_conversation.text: i dont see a weapon anywhere

recent_conversation.speaker: Detective Voss
recent_conversation.text: No weapon, huh? That's interesting. Either the perp ditched it or never needed one. What do you make of that? Either way, we gotta think outside the box. Might be something we missed, like evidence of a struggle or a weapon that ain't what it seems. Check out the surroundings again. Look for anything out of place. Small details matter in this line of work.
